title: Track Explorer landed in Minder
summary: The Track viewer / explorer behavior is now hosted inside Minder. The Tracks repo viewer/ directory can be removed when ready.

routes_added.description: Track Explorer page — sidebar with load controls, library, and timeline; main area with summary bar, track overview, and full turn-detail panel
Serve any Minder inbox/accepted/rejected track as plain text for browser fetch()
Registry JSON of all Minder tracks (accepted then inbox) plus Wheelwright samples — compatible with the registry entry format expected by the explorer
Proxy .jsonl files from /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/tracks/samples/ into the browser

Filesystem proxy rooted at /home/mario/projects. Returns .jsonl file content or JSON array of .jsonl filenames for directories. Used for hub-registry absolute-path resolution without client-side server-root config.

templates_added.description: Self-contained single-file explorer — all JS inline, no external dependencies. Orko dark purple theme. Sidebar: file upload, URL/path input, registry input, search, phase filter, sort order, library list, timeline list. Content: 4-stat summary bar, track overview (session_start/end metadata + phase tags), turn detail panel with all WAI point fields (thinking, user_intent, evolution, pivotal_statements, decisions, insights, open, activity, fossils, files_in/out, context_health).

templates_modified.change: Added Explore button in header linking to /tracks/explore

behavior_supported: Open local .jsonl Track files via file picker
Load Track by URL or relative path
Render session overview with session_start/session_end metadata
Turn-by-turn timeline with phase chips and focus text
Full turn detail: all WAI point fields rendered
Search across focus, action, thinking, decisions, insights, pivotal statements, open items
Library registry loading from JSON or JSONL
Hub-registry.json and wheel-projects.json ingestion (normalizes wheel-root entries)
WAI-Spoke/sessions/ discovery via /api/tracks/fs/ directory listing (returns JSON array, not HTML autoindex)
Absolute filesystem path mapping via pre-configured server root — no manual client config needed
Minder Tracks quick-load button (loads /api/tracks/library.json) showing all accepted+inbox tracks plus Wheelwright samples
compatibility_gaps: Hub registry mode with wheel-root entries only works when the wheel path falls under /home/mario/projects — paths outside that root are flagged in the library entry summary
No hub-registry auto-discovery candidates (the prototype tried several relative paths); use the registry URL input or the Minder Tracks button instead
recommendation: The Tracks repo viewer/ directory can be removed. The canonical home for track exploration is now http://localhost:5001/tracks/explore. The Minder Tracks button in the explorer loads all reviewed tracks plus the sample files automatically.
